heroHeadline: Houthis Enter Iran-Israel War With First Missile Strike; IDF Strikes Gaza as Ceasefire Frays
heroSubtitle: Yemen's Houthis launch first ballistic missiles at Israel since Nov 2025; Iranian missile injures 11 near Jerusalem; IDF drone kills man east of Khan Younis; UK hosts International Peace Fund conference at Lancaster House
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
